notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Kody Clemens GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens grounds into a double play, third baseman José Fermín to shortstop JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Blaze Jordan. Byron Buxton out at 2nd. Kody Clemens out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Lars Nootbaar. Luke Keaschall to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler doubles (3) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Nathan Church. Luke Keaschall scores.
